spec_match.rationale: Accurately compares the top-level requestStorageAccessFor design against the nested frame requestStorageAccess pattern.

interactive.rationale: Highly interactive. Provides two distinct action columns with execution buttons, an input box for target origins, and real-time console summaries.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Perfectly matches parent description: contrasts the top-level call side-by-side with the iframe-nested shape.

edge_cases.rationale: Outstanding edge-case handling: manages iframe load timeouts via Promises, detects cross-origin contentDocument restriction limits, and safely auto-deletes temporary frames.

references.rationale: Directly references target ChromeStatus entries, spec indices, and MDN documentation.

design_system.rationale: Beautiful side-by-side layout utilizing dotted stone cards, flat borders, responsive scaling, and crumbs.

runtime_evidence.rationale: Fresh Chrome DevTools MCP v152 sweep loaded the copied concept, exercised every detected control, found named controls, and reported no post-triage runtime/action failure.

conformance.rationale: A v152 suite now carries the same feature-ID/spec contract without modifying the immutable source-milestone suite.

summary: An exceptional migration diagnostic sandbox that contrast-tests legacy top-level API calls against modern nested iframe patterns. By incorporating asynchronous iframe loading, timeout listeners, and cross-origin security catch guards in clean, elegant vanilla JS, it stands out as a major success.
